phrases.intent_en: Ask how to walk to the Vatican from Prati
phrases.text_local: Scusi, come si raggiunge il Vaticano da qui a piedi?
phrases.pronunciation: SKOO-zee, KOH-meh see raj-JOO-njeh eel vah-tee-KAH-noh dah kwee ah PYEH-dee?
phrases.cultural_note: Prati is the elegant neighbourhood immediately north of the Vatican — St Peter's Square is a short walk through the Borgo.

responses.english: Five minutes via Via della Conciliazione.
responses.phonetic: CHEEN-kweh mee-NOO-tee per VEE-ah DEL-lah kon-chee-lyah-TSYOH-neh.
responses.local: Cinque minuti per Via della Conciliazione.

phrases.intent_en: Ask where Via Cola di Rienzo shopping street is
phrases.text_local: Buongiorno, dov'è Via Cola di Rienzo?
phrases.pronunciation: bwohn-JOHR-noh, doh-VEH VEE-ah KOH-lah dee RYEN-tsoh?

responses.english: Straight from Piazza del Risorgimento, it's the main street.
responses.phonetic: DREET-toh dah PYAHT-tsah del ree-sor-jee-MEN-toh, eh lah VEE-ah preen-chee-PAH-leh.
responses.local: Dritto da Piazza del Risorgimento, è la via principale.

phrases.intent_en: Ask where to eat near the Vatican
phrases.text_local: Scusi, c'è un buon ristorante vicino al Vaticano?
phrases.pronunciation: SKOO-zee, cheh oon bwohn rees-toh-RAN-teh vee-CHEE-noh al vah-tee-KAH-noh?

responses.english: Yes, several on Via Candia and in Prati generally.
responses.phonetic: see, dee-VER-see een VEE-ah KAN-dyah eh een PRAH-tee een jeh-neh-RAH-leh.
responses.local: Sì, diversi in Via Candia e in Prati in generale.

phrases.intent_en: Ask which metro line stops near Prati
phrases.text_local: Buongiorno, quale metro è più comoda per Prati?
phrases.pronunciation: bwohn-JOHR-noh, KWAH-leh MEH-troh eh PYOO koh-MOH-dah per PRAH-tee?

responses.english: Line A, Ottaviano stop, is the closest.
responses.phonetic: lah LEE-neh-ah ah, fer-MAH-tah ot-tah-VYAH-noh, eh lah PYOO vee-CHEE-nah.
responses.local: La linea A, fermata Ottaviano, è la più vicina.

phrases.intent_en: Ask if Prati has a good food market
phrases.text_local: Scusi, c'è un mercato alimentare a Prati?
phrases.pronunciation: SKOO-zee, cheh oon mer-KAH-toh ah-lee-men-TAH-reh ah PRAH-tee?

responses.english: Yes, the Trionfale Market on Via Andrea Doria.
responses.phonetic: see, eel mer-KAH-toh tree-on-FAH-leh een VEE-ah an-DREH-ah DOH-ryah.
responses.local: Sì, il Mercato Trionfale in Via Andrea Doria.
